Art

Thread Sewn

Books, prints & creative works

📍 Cashel Market 📍 Keel Market

About Thread Sewn

Thread Sewn is a stall for those who appreciate the intersection of craft and creativity. Featuring handbound books, art prints and creative works, this is one of the more unique stalls at Achill Island Market.

The name "Thread Sewn" refers to the traditional bookbinding technique where pages are stitched together by hand — a craft that dates back centuries. The stall carries this spirit of careful, considered craft into everything it offers.

Whether you're a book lover, an art collector, or simply looking for a meaningful gift, Thread Sewn offers pieces that celebrate the written word and visual art in equal measure. A must-visit for anyone who values thoughtful, handmade creative works.

What You'll Find

📚 Handbound Books

Beautifully crafted handbound notebooks, journals and sketchbooks.

🖼️ Art Prints

Original art prints — landscapes, illustrations and creative designs.

✍️ Creative Works

Unique creative pieces that blend art, literature and craft.

🎁 Gift Items

Thoughtful gifts for readers, writers and art lovers.

Stall Info
